footer.intro: go2dubai.online is a premium platform connecting international clients with high-end rental properties in Dubai, combining local expertise, curated listings, and a seamless booking experience.

home.heroTitle: Your Ultimate Destination for Luxury Living in Dubai
home.heroSubtitle: Exclusive apartments, waterfront villas, and curated stays in one of the world's most iconic cities.
home.introTitle: More than a destination — a global benchmark of luxury.
home.introP1: Dubai is more than a destination — it's a global benchmark of luxury, innovation, and lifestyle.
home.introP2: At go2dubai.online, we connect you with premium rental properties across the city — from vibrant urban districts to private beachfront residences.
home.introP3: Whether you're visiting for a few days or planning a longer stay, we deliver a seamless experience tailored to your expectations.
home.villasSubtitle: A curated selection of Dubai's most desirable apartments and waterfront villas.
home.whySubtitle: Curated stays, prime locations, and a service crafted around you.
home.whyCuratedText: Every property is carefully selected to meet high standards of design, comfort, and location.
home.whyLocationText: Stay in Dubai's most sought-after areas like Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, or Downtown Dubai.
home.whyFlexibleText: Short-term rentals, long-term stays, and everything in between.
home.whyServiceText: From booking to check-out — we handle everything with precision and care.
home.typeApartmentText: Modern residences with skyline or waterfront views, located in the heart of Dubai's most dynamic districts.
home.typeVillaText: Private villas with direct beach access, pools, and maximum privacy — ideal for exclusive stays.
home.typeServicedText: Hotel-level comfort combined with the privacy of your own home.
home.experienceLead: Dubai offers a lifestyle beyond expectations. Through our network, we can arrange:
home.experienceItem1: Private yacht experiences along the coastline
home.experienceItem3: VIP reservations in top restaurants and beach clubs
home.experienceOutro: Every stay becomes a curated experience.
home.locationText: From the iconic skyline of Downtown Dubai to the waterfront lifestyle of Dubai Marina and the exclusivity of Palm Jumeirah, Dubai offers unmatched diversity. Each district delivers a different lifestyle — and we help you choose the right one.
home.investorP1: Dubai is one of the fastest-growing real estate markets globally, known for strong returns, tax efficiency, and high demand.
home.investorP2: Many of our clients begin as guests — and transition into property owners. We can guide you through opportunities in areas like Dubai Creek Harbour and Dubai South.
home.ctaTitle: Find Your Perfect Stay in Dubai
home.ctaText: Discover a new level of comfort, luxury, and lifestyle.

rentals.seoDesc: Short and long-term rentals of luxury villas, apartments, and houses. Book your stay in exotic destinations.
rentals.pageTitle: Find your perfect stay in Dubai
rentals.pageSubtitle: Hand-picked villas, apartments, and beachfront residences in the world's most iconic city.
rentals.whyTitle: A seamless experience, end to end.
rentals.why1Desc: Every property is carefully selected for design, comfort, and location.
rentals.why2Desc: Stay in Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, Downtown Dubai and other iconic districts.
rentals.why3Desc: Short-term, long-term, and everything in between — tailored to you.
rentals.why4Desc: From booking to check-out, every detail is handled with precision and care.
rentals.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll personally curate a shortlist.

becomeHost.heroSubtitle: Share your Dubai villa with travelers from around the world. Earn extra income on your terms.
becomeHost.earnDesc: Set your own pricing and keep up to 90% of each booking.
becomeHost.controlDesc: Manage your calendar, pricing, and house rules anytime.
becomeHost.superhostDesc: Top hosts get priority placement and a Superhost badge.
becomeHost.easyDesc: Add your property in minutes with our guided form.
becomeHost.afterSignup: After signing up you'll be able to add and manage your listings from your dashboard.

blog.newsletterDesc: Get regular updates on new investment opportunities, market analyses, and exclusive offers delivered straight to your inbox.
